description: Letter from Khiyār b. Yaʿqūb to Abū l-Afrāḥ ʿArūs b. Yosef. In Judaeo-Arabic, with the address in both Judaeo-Arabic and Arabic script. Mentions commodities such as: silk (ḥarīr, khazz); coral; oil; soap; dustarī garments;. Mentions people such as: Abū Zikrī Yaḥyā al-Fāsī; Ibn Rajā; Abū l-Khayr Ṣedaqa al-Kohen; and Abū Yaʿqūb Yosef b. Efrayim who is to bring something to the sender in Yemen. (Information from Goitein's attached transcription.)
